tools.name: food.searchRestaurants
tools.description: Search through thousands of restaurants (in North America) by location, cuisine, budget, and more.

tools.name: ingredients.autocompleteIngredientSearch
tools.description: Autocomplete the entry of an ingredient.

tools.name: ingredients.computeIngredientAmount
tools.description: Compute the amount you need of a certain ingredient for a certain nutritional goal. For example, how much pineapple do you have to eat to get 10 grams of protein?

tools.name: ingredients.getIngredientInformation
tools.description: Use an ingredient id to get all available information about an ingredient, such as its image and supermarket aisle.

tools.name: ingredients.getIngredientSubstitutes
tools.description: Search for substitutes for a given ingredient.

tools.name: ingredients.getIngredientSubstitutesById
tools.description: Search for substitutes for a given ingredient.

tools.name: ingredients.ingredientsByIdImage
tools.description: Visualize a recipe's ingredient list.

tools.name: ingredients.ingredientSearch
tools.description: Search for simple whole foods (e.g. fruits, vegetables, nuts, grains, meat, fish, dairy etc.).

tools.name: ingredients.mapIngredientsToGroceryProducts
tools.description: Map a set of ingredients to products you can buy in the grocery store.

tools.name: ingredients.visualizeIngredients
tools.description: Visualize ingredients of a recipe. You can play around with that endpoint!

tools.name: mealPlanning.addMealPlanTemplate
tools.description: Add a meal plan template for a user.

tools.name: mealPlanning.addToMealPlan
tools.description: Add an item to the user's meal plan.

tools.name: mealPlanning.addToShoppingList
tools.description: Add an item to the current shopping list of a user.

tools.name: mealPlanning.clearMealPlanDay
tools.description: Delete all planned items from the user's meal plan for a specific day.

tools.name: mealPlanning.connectUser
tools.description: In order to call user-specific endpoints, you need to connect your app's users to spoonacular users.

tools.name: mealPlanning.deleteFromMealPlan
tools.description: Delete an item from the user's meal plan.

tools.name: mealPlanning.deleteFromShoppingList
tools.description: Delete an item from the current shopping list of the user.

tools.name: mealPlanning.deleteMealPlanTemplate
tools.description: Delete a meal plan template for a user.

tools.name: mealPlanning.generateMealPlan
tools.description: Generate a meal plan with three meals per day (breakfast, lunch, and dinner).

tools.name: mealPlanning.generateShoppingList
tools.description: Generate the shopping list for a user from the meal planner in a given time frame.

tools.name: mealPlanning.getMealPlanTemplate
tools.description: Get information about a meal plan template.

tools.name: mealPlanning.getMealPlanTemplates
tools.description: Get meal plan templates from user or public ones.

tools.name: mealPlanning.getMealPlanWeek
tools.description: Retrieve a meal planned week for the given user. The username must be a spoonacular user and the hash must the the user's hash that can be found in his/her account.

tools.name: mealPlanning.getShoppingList
tools.description: Get the current shopping list for the given user.

tools.name: menuItems.autocompleteMenuItemSearch
tools.description: Generate suggestions for menu items based on a (partial) query. The matches will be found by looking in the title only.

tools.name: menuItems.getMenuItemInformation
tools.description: Use a menu item id to get all available information about a menu item, such as nutrition.

tools.name: menuItems.menuItemNutritionByIdImage
tools.description: Visualize a menu item's nutritional information as HTML including CSS.

tools.name: menuItems.menuItemNutritionLabelImage
tools.description: Visualize a menu item's nutritional label information as an image.

tools.name: menuItems.menuItemNutritionLabelWidget
tools.description: Visualize a menu item's nutritional label information as HTML including CSS.

tools.name: menuItems.searchMenuItems
tools.description: Search over 115,000 menu items from over 800 fast food and chain restaurants. For example, McDonald's Big Mac or Starbucks Mocha.

tools.name: menuItems.visualizeMenuItemNutritionById
tools.description: Visualize a menu item's nutritional information as HTML including CSS.

tools.name: misc.detectFoodInText
tools.description: Take any text and find all mentions of food contained within it. This task is also called Named Entity Recognition (NER). In this case, the entities are foods. Either dishes, such as pizza or cheeseburger, or ingredients, such as cucumber or almonds.

tools.name: misc.getARandomFoodJoke
tools.description: Get a random joke that is related to food. Caution: this is an endpoint for adults!

tools.name: misc.getConversationSuggests
tools.description: This endpoint returns suggestions for things the user can say or ask the chatbot.

tools.name: misc.getRandomFoodTrivia
tools.description: Returns random food trivia.

tools.name: misc.imageAnalysisByUrl
tools.description: Analyze a food image. The API tries to classify the image, guess the nutrition, and find a matching recipes.

tools.name: misc.imageClassificationByUrl
tools.description: Classify a food image.

tools.name: misc.searchAllFood
tools.description: Search all food content with one call. That includes recipes, grocery products, menu items, simple foods (ingredients), and food videos.

tools.name: misc.searchCustomFoods
tools.description: Search custom foods in a user's account.

tools.name: misc.searchFoodVideos
tools.description: Find recipe and other food related videos.

tools.name: misc.searchSiteContent
tools.description: Search spoonacular's site content. You'll be able to find everything that you could also find using the search suggestions on spoonacular.com. This is a suggest API so you can send partial strings as queries.

tools.name: misc.talkToChatbot
tools.description: This endpoint can be used to have a conversation about food with the spoonacular chatbot. Use the "Get Conversation Suggests" endpoint to show your user what he or she can say.

tools.name: products.autocompleteProductSearch
tools.description: Generate suggestions for grocery products based on a (partial) query. The matches will be found by looking in the title only.

tools.name: products.classifyGroceryProduct
tools.description: This endpoint allows you to match a packaged food to a basic category, e.g. a specific brand of milk to the category milk.

tools.name: products.classifyGroceryProductBulk
tools.description: Provide a set of product jsons, get back classified products.

tools.name: products.getComparableProducts
tools.description: Find comparable products to the given one.

tools.name: products.getProductInformation
tools.description: Use a product id to get full information about a product, such as ingredients, nutrition, etc. The nutritional information is per serving.

tools.name: products.productNutritionByIdImage
tools.description: Visualize a product's nutritional information as an image.

tools.name: products.productNutritionLabelImage
tools.description: Get a product's nutrition label as an image.

tools.name: products.productNutritionLabelWidget
tools.description: Get a product's nutrition label as an HTML widget.

tools.name: products.searchGroceryProducts
tools.description: Search packaged food products, such as frozen pizza or Greek yogurt.

tools.name: products.searchGroceryProductsByUpc
tools.description: Get information about a packaged food using its UPC.

tools.name: products.visualizeProductNutritionById
tools.description: Visualize a product's nutritional information as HTML including CSS.

tools.name: recipes.analyzeARecipeSearchQuery
tools.description: Parse a recipe search query to find out its intention.

tools.name: recipes.analyzeRecipe
tools.description: This endpoint allows you to send raw recipe information, such as title, servings, and ingredients, to then see what we compute (badges, diets, nutrition, and more). This is useful if you have your own recipe data and want to enrich it with our semantic analysis.

tools.name: recipes.analyzeRecipeInstructions
tools.description: This endpoint allows you to break down instructions into atomic steps. Furthermore, each step will contain the ingredients and equipment required. Additionally, all ingredients and equipment from the recipe's instructions will be extracted independently of the step they're used in.

tools.name: recipes.autocompleteRecipeSearch
tools.description: Autocomplete a partial input to suggest possible recipe names.

tools.name: recipes.classifyCuisine
tools.description: Classify the recipe's cuisine.

tools.name: recipes.computeGlycemicLoad
tools.description: Retrieve the glycemic index for a list of ingredients and compute the individual and total glycemic load.

tools.name: recipes.convertAmounts
tools.description: Convert amounts like "2 cups of flour to grams".

tools.name: recipes.createRecipeCard
tools.description: Generate a recipe card for a recipe.

tools.name: recipes.createRecipeCardGet
tools.description: Generate a recipe card for a recipe.

tools.name: recipes.equipmentByIdImage
tools.description: Visualize a recipe's equipment list as an image.

tools.name: recipes.extractRecipeFromWebsite
tools.description: This endpoint lets you extract recipe data such as title, ingredients, and instructions from any properly formatted Website.

tools.name: recipes.getAnalyzedRecipeInstructions
tools.description: Get an analyzed breakdown of a recipe's instructions. Each step is enriched with the ingredients and equipment required.

tools.name: recipes.getRandomRecipes
tools.description: Find random (popular) recipes. If you need to filter recipes by diet, nutrition etc. you might want to consider using the complex recipe search endpoint and set the sort request parameter to random.

tools.name: recipes.getRecipeEquipmentById
tools.description: Get a recipe's equipment list.

tools.name: recipes.getRecipeInformation
tools.description: Use a recipe id to get full information about a recipe, such as ingredients, nutrition, diet and allergen information, etc.

tools.name: recipes.getRecipeInformationBulk
tools.description: Get information about multiple recipes at once. This is equivalent to calling the Get Recipe Information endpoint multiple times, but faster.

tools.name: recipes.getRecipeIngredientsById
tools.description: Get a recipe's ingredient list.

tools.name: recipes.getRecipeNutritionWidgetById
tools.description: Get a recipe's nutrition data.

tools.name: recipes.getRecipePriceBreakdownById
tools.description: Get a recipe's price breakdown data.

tools.name: recipes.getRecipeTasteById
tools.description: Get a recipe's taste. The tastes supported are sweet, salty, sour, bitter, savory, and fatty.

tools.name: recipes.getSimilarRecipes
tools.description: Find recipes which are similar to the given one.

tools.name: recipes.guessNutritionByDishName
tools.description: Estimate the macronutrients of a dish based on its title.

tools.name: recipes.parseIngredients
tools.description: Extract an ingredient from plain text.

tools.name: recipes.priceBreakdownByIdImage
tools.description: Visualize a recipe's price breakdown.

tools.name: recipes.quickAnswer
tools.description: Answer a nutrition related natural language question.

tools.name: recipes.recipeNutritionByIdImage
tools.description: Visualize a recipe's nutritional information as an image.

tools.name: recipes.recipeNutritionLabelImage
tools.description: Get a recipe's nutrition label as an image.

tools.name: recipes.recipeNutritionLabelWidget
tools.description: Get a recipe's nutrition label as an HTML widget.

tools.name: recipes.recipeTasteByIdImage
tools.description: Get a recipe's taste as an image. The tastes supported are sweet, salty, sour, bitter, savory, and fatty.

tools.name: recipes.searchRecipes
tools.description: Search through hundreds of thousands of recipes using advanced filtering and ranking. NOTE: This method combines searching by query, by ingredients, and by nutrients into one endpoint.

tools.name: recipes.searchRecipesByIngredients
tools.description: Ever wondered what recipes you can cook with the ingredients you have in your fridge or pantry? This endpoint lets you find recipes that either maximize the usage of ingredients you have at hand (pre shopping) or minimize the ingredients that you don't currently have (post shopping).

tools.name: recipes.searchRecipesByNutrients
tools.description: Find a set of recipes that adhere to the given nutritional limits. You may set limits for macronutrients (calories, protein, fat, and carbohydrate) and/or many micronutrients.

tools.name: recipes.summarizeRecipe
tools.description: Automatically generate a short description that summarizes key information about the recipe.

tools.name: recipes.visualizeEquipment
tools.description: Visualize the equipment used to make a recipe.

tools.name: recipes.visualizePriceBreakdown
tools.description: Visualize the price breakdown of a recipe.

tools.name: recipes.visualizeRecipeEquipmentById
tools.description: Visualize a recipe's equipment list.

tools.name: recipes.visualizeRecipeIngredientsById
tools.description: Visualize a recipe's ingredient list.

tools.name: recipes.visualizeRecipeNutrition
tools.description: Visualize a recipe's nutritional information as HTML including CSS.

tools.name: recipes.visualizeRecipeNutritionById
tools.description: Visualize a recipe's nutritional information as HTML including CSS.

tools.name: recipes.visualizeRecipePriceBreakdownById
tools.description: Visualize a recipe's price breakdown.

tools.name: recipes.visualizeRecipeTaste
tools.description: Visualize a recipe's taste information as HTML including CSS. You can play around with that endpoint!

tools.name: recipes.visualizeRecipeTasteById
tools.description: Get a recipe's taste. The tastes supported are sweet, salty, sour, bitter, savory, and fatty.

tools.name: wine.getDishPairingForWine
tools.description: Find a dish that goes well with a given wine.

tools.name: wine.getWineDescription
tools.description: Get a simple description of a certain wine, e.g. "malbec", "riesling", or "merlot".

tools.name: wine.getWinePairing
tools.description: Find a wine that goes well with a food. Food can be a dish name ("steak"), an ingredient name ("salmon"), or a cuisine ("italian").

tools.name: wine.getWineRecommendation
tools.description: Get a specific wine recommendation (concrete product) for a given wine type, e.g. "merlot".

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
